name: Generic Puppy Training Pad- 60 by 90cm Large (1 piece)
description: Puppy training pad training is great for puppy-owners without easy access to outdoors for their pets and those living in tall buildings. Make clean-up easy and are convenient for potty training. BENEFITS: 1 . Super-absorbent core. 2. Leak-proof with plastic lining to prevent damage to floors. 3. Quick-dry surface with built-in attractant 4. They're comfortable for dogs. 5. They make clean-up easy. 6. They're good options for dogs who can't go outside for health reasons.
